solution.p: There are a few ways to solve quadratic equations- the easiest way to solve this particular type of problem is to use the square root method.

p.m: \displaystyle{ \begin{aligned} 2 \amp = 65 - (y+8)^2 \\ 2 \mathbf{{}-65} \amp = 65 - (y+8)^2 \mathbf{{}-65} \\ -63 \amp = - (y+8)^2 \\ (-1)\cdot (-63) \amp = (-1)\cdot[- (y+8)^2] \\ 63 \amp = (y+8)^2 \\ \pm\sqrt{63} \amp = \sqrt{(y+8)^2} \\ \pm\sqrt{3^2\cdot7} \amp = y+8 \\ \pm3\sqrt{7} \amp = y+8 \\ -8\pm3\sqrt{7} \amp = y \\ y\amp =-8+3\sqrt{7}\text{ or } y=-8-3\sqrt{7}\\ \end{aligned} }
